mapper.sql: id, traffic_id, event_id, request_time, source_ip, target_ip, source_port, target_port, http_method, protocol, request_uri, query_params, request_headers, request_body, response_status, response_body, response_time, content_type, user_agent, cookie, request_count, state_tag, state_value, confidence, is_aggregated, aggregate_start_time, aggregate_end_time, error_count, avg_processing_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_traffic_monitor ( traffic_id, event_id, request_time, source_ip, target_ip, source_port, target_port, http_method, protocol, request_uri, query_params, request_headers, request_body, response_status, response_body, response_time, content_type, user_agent, cookie, request_count, state_tag, state_value, confidence, is_aggregated, aggregate_start_time, aggregate_end_time, error_count, avg_processing_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{trafficId}, #{eventId}, #{requestTime}, #{sourceIp}, #{targetIp}, #{sourcePort}, #{targetPort}, #{httpMethod}, #{protocol}, #{requestUri}, #{queryParams}, #{requestHeaders}, #{requestBody}, #{responseStatus}, #{responseBody}, #{responseTime}, #{contentType}, #{userAgent}, #{cookie}, #{requestCount}, #{stateTag}, #{stateValue}, #{confidence}, #{isAggregated}, #{aggregateStartTime}, #{aggregateEndTime}, #{errorCount}, #{avgProcessingTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )

INSERT INTO sys_traffic_monitor ( traffic_id, request_time, source_ip, target_ip, source_port, target_port, http_method, protocol, request_uri, query_params, request_headers, request_body, response_status, response_body, response_time, content_type, user_agent, cookie, request_count, state_tag, state_value, confidence, is_aggregated, aggregate_start_time, aggregate_end_time, error_count, avg_processing_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
(#{item.trafficId}, #{item.requestTime}, #{item.sourceIp}, #{item.targetIp}, #{item.sourcePort}, #{item.targetPort}, #{item.httpMethod}, #{item.protocol}, #{item.requestUri}, #{item.queryParams}, #{item.requestHeaders}, #{item.requestBody}, #{item.responseStatus}, #{item.responseBody}, #{item.responseTime}, #{item.contentType}, #{item.userAgent}, #{item.cookie}, #{item.requestCount}, #{item.stateTag}, #{item.stateValue}, #{item.confidence}, #{item.isAggregated}, #{item.aggregateStartTime}, #{item.aggregateEndTime}, #{item.errorCount}, #{item.avgProcessingTime}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(request_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00') as time, COALESCE(SUM(request_count), 0) as count FROM sys_traffic_monitor WHERE request_time >= #{startTime} AND request_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(request_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00') ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT CASE WHEN #{intervalMinutes} >= 1440 THEN DATE_FORMAT(request_time, '%Y-%m-%d') WHEN #{intervalMinutes} >= 60 THEN DATE_FORMAT(request_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00') ELSE CONCAT( DATE_FORMAT(request_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:'), LPAD(FLOOR(MINUTE(request_time) / #{intervalMinutes}) * #{intervalMinutes}, 2, '0') ) END as time, COALESCE(SUM(request_count), 0) as count FROM sys_traffic_monitor WHERE request_time >= #{startTime} AND request_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY CASE WHEN #{intervalMinutes} >= 1440 THEN DATE_FORMAT(request_time, '%Y-%m-%d') WHEN #{intervalMinutes} >= 60 THEN DATE_FORMAT(request_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00') ELSE CONCAT( DATE_FORMAT(request_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:'), LPAD(FLOOR(MINUTE(request_time) / #{intervalMinutes}) * #{intervalMinutes}, 2, '0') ) END ORDER BY time ASC
